name: workovercv
description: Run WorkOverCV repository employment-signal assessments from Codex using the shared CLI and bundled workflow references.

interface.shortDescription: Assess public repositories with evidence-bounded employment signals.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill that runs WorkOverCV discovery, collection, agent-authored ledgers, report rendering, and strict validation using bundled workflow references without redefining the workflow.
defaultPrompt: Run WorkOverCV on this GitHub profile.
